examples: They also availed themselves of other forms of expression with metaphorical meaning, some probably original, some derived from Toltec coinages.
It turns out Levy is talking in metaphorical terms.
Windows and doors have important metaphorical meanings.
Is City in a similar situation with Sir Alex sticking metaphorical pins in virtual voodoo dolls?
Clinton called the United States "uniquely well-positioned" to help construct that metaphorical global edifice.
